data.content:
Now I have all the data. Let me identify conflicts and create the CPM setup:

- **System.Text.Json**: 10.0.1 (Api, Shared, Tests) vs 8.0.4 (Worker) → **10.0.1**
- **Azure.Identity**: 1.13.2 (Api) vs 1.11.4 (Shared) → **1.13.2**

Creating `Directory.Packages.props` and stripping versions from all `.csproj` files:

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>

data.reasoningText:
Now I have all the information. Let me analyze the packages and their versions:

| Package | Api | Worker | Shared | Tests |
|---------|-----|--------|--------|-------|
| System.Text.Json | 10.0.1 | 8.0.4 | 10.0.1 | 10.0.1 |
| Azure.Identity | 1.13.2 | - | 1.11.4 | - |
| Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting | - | 8.0.1 | - | - |
| OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting | - | 1.15.0 | - | - |


| xunit | - | - | - | 2.9.3 |

I can see there are version conflicts with System.Text.Json and Azure.Identity across the projects, so I'll need to use the highest versions available. My approach is to centralize all package versions in a Directory.Packages.props file and then remove the individual version attributes from each project's csproj files.

arguments.file_text:
<Project>
  <PropertyGroup>
    <ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>true</ManagePackageVersionsCentrally>
  </PropertyGroup>
  <ItemGroup>
    <PackageVersion Include="Azure.Identity" Version="1.13.2" />
    <PackageVersion Include="Microsoft.Extensions.Hosting" Version="8.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="OpenTelemetry.Extensions.Hosting" Version="1.15.0" />
    <PackageVersion Include="System.Text.Json" Version="10.0.1" />
    <PackageVersion Include="xunit" Version="2.9.3" />
  </ItemGroup>
</Project>
